description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a pastel pink exterior adorned with playful fruit-themed graphics, including peaches and watermelon slices, giving it a whimsical and inviting appearance. The front panel houses a large rectangular screen with a turquoise bezel, situated above a black control panel that includes two white buttons and a joystick, as well as a coin slot area. The marquee at the top displays the name 'Unicorn Tracker' in a stylized, light-colored font, surrounded by soft, colorful accents. Both side panels are decorated with vibrant illustrations of swirled green ice cream, fruit slices, and additional pastel motifs, enhancing the cabinet's cheerful aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is plain black, likely for maintenance access, and contrasts with the otherwise colorful design. The overall build appears to be sturdy, typical of classic arcade machines, with a hard, glossy finish and a slightly curved profile on the side panels.
description: A pastel pink arcade game cabinet with fruit-themed graphics, a turquoise screen, and a whimsical 'Unicorn Tracker' marquee. The control panel features buttons, a joystick, and a coin slot, while the sides are decorated with colorful fruit and ice cream illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the turquoise screen, black control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and the 'Unicorn Tracker' marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pastel pink panel with fruit and ice cream graphics, and the cabinet's curved profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel, likely for maintenance, with no visible graphics or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching fruit and ice cream artwork and the same curved side profile.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (rectangular, flat, with turquoise bezel; no visible curvature or display technology details)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two white buttons, arranged in a simple, accessible configuration on a black panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; pastel pink background with 'Unicorn Tracker' text in a whimsical font, surrounded by soft, colorful accents matching the cabinet's playful theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature vibrant fruit and ice cream illustrations in pastel colors, including peaches, watermelon slices, and swirled green ice cream, contributing to a cheerful and whimsical theme.
